content.en:
Last time, Ye Tian came here and was directly killed in seconds.

But now, his strength far surpassed the last time, even stronger than the Origin Ancestor before he broke through in half a step, and the supreme Dao rule power here would definitely not be able to kill him in an instant.

"Supreme Dao Vajra Body!"

Ye Tian used this magic power, and then walked in.

Rumble!!!!!

The rules of the Supreme Dao turned into countless silk threads and seemed to strangle Ye Tian, but they were all blocked by the Supreme Dao Vajra Body.

Then.

Ye Tian saw a huge fragment, but this fragment was vaguely connected to the prison, containing the power of the prison.

"This prison fragment already has the power of a prison, no wonder it's so terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He tried to retrieve the shard, but couldn't shake it.

No, it's not that it can't be shaken, but if it is shaken, you need to do everything you can, in that case, it will inevitably destroy the prison.

With his strength, he can only destroy the prison little by little, and he will definitely be discovered by the existence outside the prison.

When the time comes, he will be exposed.

"Anyway, the Supreme Dao rules here can't help me, I'll just comprehend the Supreme Dao rules here, and consume the power contained in the fragments little by little!" Ye Tian decided.

Next.

It was here that his replica body comprehended the rules of the Dao, and time passed gradually.

"Yes, the effect of comprehending the rules of the Supreme Dao here is indeed very good!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

If he continued like this, his Supreme Dao Rule Realm would inevitably improve a lot.

I don't know it, but tens of millions of primeval years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian clearly felt that the power of the Supreme Dao Rules contained in this fragment no longer had a greatly improved effect on him.

"But yes, this is just a prison fragment, even if it is a real prison, it may not be able to improve my Supreme Dao rules much. "

Ye Tian thought so.

Now, in addition to the improvement of the Supreme Dao Rules, his strength is only improved by cultivation.

But he is still far from the eighth balance realm, even if it is a billion primeval era, it is difficult to raise to the limit of the seventh balance!

And the land of the Eternal Shore, the Reincarnation Domain, and the Ruins of Reincarnation don't seem to have many resources to help him improve his strength.

"No, there's a place that doesn't seem to have been there yet!"

The place Ye Tian said was the sea of fire in the heart of the Origin Ancestor.

The Sea of Heart Flames was enough to turn the body of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord into ashes, which was very dangerous, and he was there refining the Reincarnation Arcana last time.

After that, he never went.

Maybe there's a chance there.

"Go there and have a look!"

Ye Tian quickly arrived at the Heart Flame Sea and stepped into it immediately.

Rumble!!!!!

The terrifying flame of the heart flame continued to burn Ye Tian's body, but it couldn't burn his body.

The Heart Flame Sea was very large, but Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and he came to the core area of the Heart Flame Sea in a blink of an eye.

Here, he saw the fiery red liquid converging to form a lake.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian didn't know this fiery red liquid, but he sensed a rich energy from it, and as soon as he approached this lake, his flesh was filled with longing.

Obviously, this fiery red liquid is definitely a good thing, and it will help him improve his cultivation a lot.

"Maybe you can try. "

Ye Tian grabbed a drop of fiery red liquid and began refining.

Rumble!!!!

The fiery red liquid erupted in Ye Tian's body, sweeping through his body, if it weren't for the Supreme Dao Rule Protection, his physical body would have turned into ashes in an instant.

With the help of the Supreme Dao Rules, Ye Tian still refined this drop of fiery red liquid little by little.

And his Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will are all rapidly improving, which is equivalent to a lot of improvement in cultivation.

"It's useful, and the effect of this fiery red liquid to improve cultivation far exceeds any kind of resource!"

Ye Tian was excited.

It is estimated that these good things have also evolved over countless years, and the other eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can't enter here at all, and even the other Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can't get in.

Only Ye Tiancai has the strength to come in, and now he is naturally cheaper.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian directly entered this lake and began to absorb the energy of this fiery red liquid.

Now.

The fiery red liquid continued to pour into Ye Tian's body, refining his body in all aspects, and his cultivation skyrocketed rapidly.

At this rate, at most ten million primeval eras, he would be able to raise his cultivation to the limit of the seventh balance.

Time flies.

Ten million primeval years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had skyrocketed, reaching the limit of the seventh balance.

At this point, he is qualified to attack the eighth balance realm.

However, from the seventh balance realm to the eighth balance realm, how terrifying is its difficulty.

"This fiery red liquid should also help me break through, but it's not enough, if I can use it as a material for the three-source secret elixir and research a new three-source secret elixir, I will be able to have a chance to break through!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He began to continue researching, thus creating a new three-source secret medicine.

Fortunately, there is more fiery red liquid here, and I am not afraid of wasting it.

Once!

Twice!

Ten times!

Hundreds!

Ye Tian had wasted a lot of fiery red liquid after tens of thousands of studies, but this kind of research was worth it.

If he couldn't step into the eighth balance realm, he would actually not be able to truly compete with the existence outside the prison, at most he would be able to save his life in front of such a strong person for a while.

But that kind of existence may be a weak existence outside the prison, he doesn't understand the situation, and he must have enough strength to do it.

So, he had to break through to the eighth balance realm.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally researched a new three-source secret medicine.

The effect of this three-source secret medicine was dozens of times that of the past, and Ye Tian refined a large number of three-source secret medicine in one go, almost exhausting the fiery red liquid in this lake.

"Now it's a desperate gamble, if I exhaust these new three-source secret pills this time, and I still can't break through, then I'm afraid I really can't raise my cultivation to the eighth balance realm in prison, so I can only find other ways to rush out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian slammed into the eighth balance realm.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian took the three-source secret medicine and many materials, and then the bottleneck was like an immortal divine mountain, no matter how his strength shook it, it was only a slight crack, but he couldn't continue to impact.

"Go on!"

Ye Tian took the second dose of the three-source secret medicine.

This time, the bottleneck has relaxed a little, but it has not been broken.

The third time!

Fourth!

Ye Tian hit the bottleneck again and again, vowing to grind the bottleneck open.

I don't know how many times.

Finally.

Click!!!!

The bottleneck in the dark was broken through by Ye Tian!
